name: How do I get paid while recovering from work chemical illness in Boise?
description: TTD at 2/3 wages plus medical from claim filing.[5]

mainEntity.name: How do I get paid while recovering from work chemical illness in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: TTD at 2/3 wages plus medical from claim filing.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description: File for temporary total disability (TTD) benefits at 2/3 wages from day one.[5] Idaho mandates employer-paid medical and TTD during recovery.[5] Key factors: (1) doctor work release; (2) wage verification; (3) ongoing proof. Submit earnings stubs. Extend via re-eval. Covers until MMI.
